verbGlossary.EXECUTES UNDER: {source} delivers {target} using the target delivery method structure (e.g., GC executes under design-bid-build)
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED AS: {source} is designated as the named party for {target} attribute (e.g., AOR firm assigned as the architect of record)
verbGlossary.PERFORMS WITHIN: {source} self-performs work scope captured by {target} attribute percentage
verbGlossary.MANAGES UNDER: {source} administers {target} under the target program type's multi-project structure
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED AS: {source} is categorized by the target owner type attribute on {target} record
verbGlossary.MANDATES: {source}requires {target} attribute as a condition of contract
verbGlossary.DESIGNS FOR: {source}ing or design organization produces design documents addressing {target} attribute's requirements
verbGlossary.RECOMMENDS: {source} organization provides expert recommendation that determines {target} building attribute selection
verbGlossary.COUNTED TOWARD: {source} contributes to the numeric total captured in {target} attribute
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative analysis
verbGlossary.FABRICATES FOR: {source} or fabricator organization produces components specified by {target} scope attribute
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED FOR: {source} provides equipment appropriate to {target} site constraint conditions
verbGlossary.INSPECTS FOR: {source} performs inspections specific to {target} attribute's material requirements
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONS FOR: {source} verifies building systems to satisfy the target certification's performance requirements
verbGlossary.UNDERWRITES FOR: {source}provides surety, bonding, or insurance backing scaled to {target} requirement or value
verbGlossary.ENFORCES: Regulatory organization administers and enforces the target code or standard on {target}
verbGlossary.AUDITS AGAINST: {source}reviews project performance against {target} or quality metric
verbGlossary.SERVES: {source}provides service to {target} at the target address attribute location
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source}-level metric is compared against {target} attribute threshold
